A

action() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data.Transition
Returns the value of the action record component.
Action - Interface in edu.bu.pas.risk.action
This interface encapsulates all possible actions a player may take during their turn.
actionBackwards(Matrix, Matrix, Matrix) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.model.DualDecoderModel
 
actionBatchSize() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.TrainerAgent.TrainConfig
Returns the value of the actionBatchSize record component.
actionForward(Matrix, Matrix) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.model.DualDecoderModel
A method to get Q(s,a) by passing the state features through the encoder, concatenating the output vector with the action features and passing that vector through the action decoder.
ActionSensorArray - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.senses
Represents a suite of sensors which converts an Action into a feature vector
ActionSensorArray(int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.senses.ActionSensorArray
 
addArmies(int) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwner
Adds the given number to the number of armies... e.g. passing n=2 will add 2 armies to the internal counter.
addTransition(Transition<ACTION_TYPE>) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data.ReplayBuffer
 
adjacentTerritories() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory
Returns the value of the adjacentTerritories record component.
agentId() - Method in interface edu.bu.pas.risk.action.Action
Returns the agent who is attempting this action.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.AttackAction
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.FortifyAction
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.NoAction
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.RedeemCardsAction
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.DummyAgent
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.FSMAgent
Returns the agent's unique id and turn order, e.g. 0 for the player who goes first, 1 for the player who goes 2nd, etc.
agentId() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns the agent's unique id and turn order, e.g. 0 for the player who goes first, 1 for the player who goes 2nd, etc.
agentId() - Method in interface edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.IAgent
Returns the agent's unique id and turn order, e.g. 0 for the player who goes first, 1 for the player who goes 2nd, etc.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.RandomAgent
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.StaticAgent
Returns the value of the agentId record component.
agentId() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.TrainerAgent
Returns the agent's unique id and turn order, e.g. 0 for the player who goes first, 1 for the player who goes 2nd, etc.

Represents an action to attack a territory from another territory.

chooseAttackActionRedeemIfForced(GameView, int, boolean) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.FSMAgent
A method to get the Action when you are in the attack (and maybe redeem) phase of your turn
chooseAttackActionRedeemIfForced(GameView, int, boolean) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.NeuralQAgent
 
chooseFortifySkipAction(GameView, int, boolean) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.FSMAgent
A method to get the Action when you are in the fortify/skip fortify phase of your turn.
chooseFortifySkipAction(GameView, int, boolean) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.NeuralQAgent

Returns a deep copy of this action.

Returns a deep copy of this action.
clone() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Board
Returns a deep copy of this board, including cloned continents, territories, and fully rebuilt adjacency graphs.
clone() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Continent
 
clone() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory

clone() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.util.Registry
Returns a shallow copy of this registry.

contains(int, int) - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.TerritoryGeometry
Returns true if the given point (in native/JSON coordinate space) is inside this territory's polygon.
contains(Territory) - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Continent
Returns true if the given territory is within this continent.

Returns the value of the continent record component.

A continent is an immutable grouping of territories. e.g.

Executes a single turn for the current agent.
drawPile - Variable in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
 
DualDecoderModel - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.model
This class represents a dual-pipeline neural network with a shared encoder (e.g. two separate decoders and one shared encoder).
DualDecoderModel(Model, Model, Model) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.model.DualDecoderModel
 
DummyAgent - Record Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent
When we provide copies of GameView to you, we replace the actual agents with these dummy agents for security reasons.
DummyAgent(int) - Constructor for record class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.DummyAgent
Creates an instance of a DummyAgent record class.

Represents an action to fortify troops from one of your territories to another one of your connected territories.

Creates an instance of a FortifyAction record class.

FSMAgent - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent
Represents a class that moves through a finite state machine when deciding what Actions to make during its turn.

G

Game - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk
The mutable game state for Risk.

Copy constructor.
Game(Random, Board, List<IAgent>) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.Game
 
GameView - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk
An immutable version of Risk.
GameView(GameView) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
Copy constructor.
GameView(Random, Board, List<IAgent>) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
Creates a new game view with the given board and agents.
generateCards(Board) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
In risk, each territory gets 1 card, and then there are 2 wild cards.
generateSortedDiceRolls(Random, int) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.AttackAction
Rolls n 6 sided dice, then sorts the array in reverse natural order.
GeometryLoader - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Loads territory geometry from JSON.

The board (e.g. the whole world) that holds all the territories, continents, etc.

Returns the number of bonus armies an agent will receive at the start of their turn.

getContinentsOwnedBy(int) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
Returns the list of all continents owned by a specific agent.
getCurrentActionCounter() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns the action counter from the most recent HumanAgent.getAction(edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView, int, boolean) call.
getCurrentGameView() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns the most recent game view snapshot passed to this agent.
getCurrentRemainingArmies() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns the number of armies this agent has left to place.
getDrawPile() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
Returns the stack (LIFO) of territory cards.

Returns the total duration of this animation in milliseconds.

Returns the end turn action button.

Returns the fortify action button.
getFullTransitionReward(GameView, ACTION_TYPE, GameView) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards.RewardFunction
A method to calculate the reward as a function of the game you were in, the action selected in that state, and how that action resolved R(s,a,s').
getGame() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskPanel
Returns the current game view being rendered.
getGroundTruth(Transition<T>, double) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.NeuralQAgent
 
getHalfTransitionReward(GameView, ACTION_TYPE) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards.RewardFunction
A method to calculate the reward only as a function of the current state of the game and action chosen R(s,a).
getHoveredTerritoryId() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskPanel
Returns the id of the territory currently under the mouse cursor.
getInputMode() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns the current input mode of this agent.

getNumMoves() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.TrainerAgent
 
getNumPreviousRedemptions() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
The number of territory card trade-ins that have happened so far.
getNumTurns() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
The number of turns played total, where 1 turn is the set of actions 1 player takes before passing to the next player.

getRedemptionAmount(int) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard

hasValidTrade(List<TerritoryCard>) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
Returns true iff any combination of 3 cards from the given list forms a valid grouping that can be traded in for armies.

I

IAgent - Interface in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent
Represents the base agent that can take an action in Risk.

The unique integer, indexed at 0, of this object.

Side panel showing game state info: current turn, status, cards, and action buttons for human players.

initModel() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.NeuralQAgent
 
InvalidActionException - Exception Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.action
This exception is thrown whenever an agent performs some Action with invalid parameters, or an otherwise illegal state.
InvalidActionException(int, String) - Constructor for exception class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.InvalidActionException
Creates a new exception for an illegal action.
isAdjacentTo(Territory) - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory
Returns true if the given territory is adjacent to this one.
isConnected(GameView, Territory, Territory) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.FortifyAction
Checks if the 2 given territory are connected by using a Breadth First Search.
isCurrentIsDuringSetup() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Returns whether the current placement is during the initial setup phase.
isFinished() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskAnimation
Returns whether this animation has completed.
isOver() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
Returns true if the game is over (only 1 player owns territories).
isTerminal() - Method in interface edu.bu.pas.risk.action.Action
Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
isTerminal() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.AttackAction
Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
isTerminal() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.FortifyAction
Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
isTerminal() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.NoAction
Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
isTerminal() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.action.RedeemCardsAction
Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.

isTraining() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.TrainerAgent
 
isUnclaimed() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
Returns true iff this territory has no owner.
isValidGrouping(List<TerritoryCard>) - Static method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
Returns true iff one of the following conditions are met: 3 cards of the same army value 1 of each of the 3 army values any 2 plus a wild card
isWild() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
Returns the value of the isWild record component.
iterator() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Continent
Returns an iterator over the territories in this continent.
iterator() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory
Returns an iterator over the adjacent territories.
iterator() - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.util.Registry
Returns an iterator over the items in this registry, ordered by id.

placementForward(Matrix, Matrix) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.model.DualDecoderModel

Registers a listener to receive game event callbacks.
Registry<T> - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.util
A registry is a wrapper around a Map that lets us keep an immutable snapshot of an array of data.
Registry(Collection<? extends T>) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.util.Registry
Creates a new registry from the given items.
Registry(Map<String, T>, List<T>) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.util.Registry
Creates a new registry from pre-built lookup structures.
render(Graphics2D, RiskPanel) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.DelayAnimation
Renders this animation's current frame.
render(Graphics2D, RiskPanel) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskAnimation
Renders this animation's current frame.
render(Graphics2D, RiskPanel) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.UpdateGameStateAnimation
Renders this animation's current frame.
ReplacementType - Enum Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data
Represents an eviction policy for fixed-size buffers
ReplayBuffer<ACTION_TYPE> - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data
Represents a replay buffer for training a q-function backed via a neural network.
ReplayBuffer(ReplacementType, int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data.ReplayBuffer
 
ReplayBuffer(ReplacementType, int, Random) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data.ReplayBuffer
 
RewardFunction<ACTION_TYPE> - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards
Represents a configurable bounded reward function.
RewardFunction(RewardType, int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards.RewardFunction
 
RewardType - Enum Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards
Represents a phase of a turn in risk.
RiskAnimation - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Base class for all Risk animations.
RiskAnimation(int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskAnimation
Creates a new animation with the given duration.
RiskAnimationListener - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Bridges game events to the UI by queuing animations and updating panels.
RiskAnimationListener(RiskPanel, InfoPanel, Game) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskAnimationListener
Creates a new animation listener bridging the given panels and game.
RiskController - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Orchestrates the interaction between the map panel, info panel, and HumanAgent.
RiskController(RiskPanel, InfoPanel, HumanAgent) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.RiskController
 
RiskListener - Interface in edu.bu.pas.risk.util
Callback interface for game events.
RiskPanel - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Main map rendering panel for Risk.

Creates a new map panel for the given map name.

Completes the pending action request with the given action.
submitPlacement(Territory) - Method in class edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
Completes the pending army placement with the given territory.

T

territories() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Board
Returns the value of the territories record component.
territories() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Continent
Returns the value of the territories record component.
territory - Variable in class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
 
territory() - Method in record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
Returns the value of the territory record component.
Territory - Record Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.territory
1 single immutable territory or country that can be captured.
Territory(int, String, Continent, Set<Territory>) - Constructor for record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory
Creates an instance of a Territory record class.
TerritoryCard - Record Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.territory
Whenever an agent conquers a territory, and they have not already been rewarded a card this turn, then they receive a territory card which can be redeemed for free armies.
TerritoryCard(Territory, int, boolean) - Constructor for record class edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.TerritoryCard
Creates an instance of a TerritoryCard record class.
TerritoryGeometry - Record Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
Stores the visual geometry for a single territory.
TerritoryGeometry(int, String, Point, Polygon) - Constructor for record class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.TerritoryGeometry
Creates an instance of a TerritoryGeometry record class.
TerritoryOwner - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk
A mutable version of TerritoryOwnerView.
TerritoryOwner(Territory) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwner
Creates an unclaimed mutable territory owner with 0 armies.
TerritoryOwner(Territory, int, int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwner
Creates a mutable territory owner with the given owner and army count.
TerritoryOwner(TerritoryOwnerView) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwner
Copy constructor.
territoryOwners - Variable in class edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
 
TerritoryOwnerView - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk
Stores information about territory ownership... e.g. who owns a territory.
TerritoryOwnerView(Territory) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
Creates an unclaimed territory owner with 0 armies.
TerritoryOwnerView(Territory, int, int) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
Creates a territory owner with the given owner and army count.
TerritoryOwnerView(TerritoryOwnerView) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
Copy constructor.

TrustlessRiskListener - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.util
Wraps a RiskListener and makes it secure via: adding timeouts copying game state catching unhandled exceptions
TrustlessRiskListener(RiskListener, long, Consumer<Throwable>) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.util.TrustlessRiskListener
Wraps the given listener with timeout and error handling.

Updates the info panel with the current game state.
UpdateGameStateAnimation - Class in edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer
A zero-duration animation that updates the RiskPanel's game state snapshot.
UpdateGameStateAnimation(Game) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.risk.renderer.UpdateGameStateAnimation
Creates an animation that captures a snapshot of the current game state.
